name: Phase 9: Quota System & Hero Badge
description: Verifies quota counting, hero badge visibility, and checks for stale quota state bugs.

planSteps.description: Navigate to / and clear localStorage to start fresh
Assert that the live demo section shows text '2 / 2 demo calls left this week'
Assert that the hero pill 'Demo quota is now available' is visible
Set localStorage key 'fud_demo_usage' to a count of 2 with a valid windowStart
Assert that the live demo section shows 'Weekly demo limit reached' and the submit button is disabled
Assert that the hero pill 'Demo quota is now available' is hidden
Set localStorage key 'fud_demo_usage' to a count of 2 but with windowStart set to 8 days ago (expired)
Assert that the hero pill 'Demo quota is now available' is still hidden
Assert that the live demo section shows 'Weekly demo limit reached' or is disabled
